历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 1836 → 1432 → 1729 → 1825 → 1543, fluctuating within the 1400–1850 range. The 2025 baseline is about 1543, with a slight upward trend in recent years. The provincial science enrollment plan was 25 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 15 in 2025, showing a year-on-year decrease. In 2026, the physics category plan significantly increases to 32, an expansion of about 113% compared to 2025, notably alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking (main campus), it ranked approximately 12th in 2026, stable in the Top 15 in recent years, belonging to top-tier engineering institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. It has 17 A- or above disciplines including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Automation continue to be highly popular. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 1543 and the significant 113% expansion in 2026, the admission threshold will notably decrease (ranking number increases). However, the 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees and high Douyin popularity partially offset the expansion effect. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2542, with a range of 2364–2720.

If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 2720), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
